languages.text: "Этот шум в голове, приступы боли — последствия ее визга?"
"The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"
languages.original_text: "Этот шум в голове, приступы боли — последствия ее визга?"

traits.locale_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"
"The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"
"The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"
"The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

languages.text: 「あの低い唸りと、痛みが来たり消えたりするのは――その叫び声のせいか？」
languages.original_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

traits.locale_text: あの低い唸りと、痛みが来たり消えたりするのは――その叫び声のせいなんですか？

languages.text: « Le bourdonnement, les accès de douleur... Est-ce à cause de son cri ? »
languages.original_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

traits.locale_text: « Le bourdonnement, les accès de douleur... Est-ce à cause de son cri ? »

languages.text: "Uğultulu gürültü, gelip giden acı... Bunlar çığlık yüzünden mi?"
languages.original_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

traits.locale_text: "Uğultulu gürültü, gelip giden acı... Bunlar çığlık yüzünden mi?"

languages.text: «Ese zumbido, con el dolor intermitente, ¿es obra de sus gritos?».
languages.original_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

traits.locale_text: «Ese zumbido, con el dolor intermitente, ¿es obra de sus gritos?».

languages.text: “那嗡嗡声，时有时无的痛楚——是它的叫声引起的吗？”
languages.original_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

traits.locale_text: “那嗡嗡声，时有时无的痛楚——是它的叫声引起的吗？”

languages.text: "Das Summen, der Schmerz, der kommt und geht – sind das die Folgen seines Schreis?"
languages.original_text: "The humming noise, the pain that comes and goes — is that a result of its cry?"

traits.locale_text: "Das Summen, der Schmerz, der kommt und geht – sind das die Folgen seines Schreis?"
